reference: Hi, this looks like an infection, probably viral, with myalgia. The best remedy is to take rest, as that helps a lot to control the pain and provides a soothing feeling to the aching muscles. In a few days, the symptoms will begin to get under control; until then, analgesics as needed will be required.
text: Hi, this looks like an infection, probably viral with myalgia. The best remedy is to take rest, as that helps a lot to control the pain and provides a soothing feeling to the aching muscle. In a few days, the symptoms will begin to get under control. Until then, analgesics, as needed, will be required.
